title: Primary-repo flat contact discovery repair
why_now: The latest execution board was still in truthful measurement hold, so duplicating current Reddit, Apollo, StackOverflow, curator, or manual packets would have been fake progress.
The current bottleneck remains distribution and message to primary repo conversion, which makes publisher/contact discovery a valid same-run repair lane during hold.
A fresh high-reach publisher surface existed at Dupple with a live AI coding comparison page and usable contact paths, but it was missing from the shared discovery artifact.

repairs_applied.change: Added Dupple as a new publisher target with a fresh AI coding comparison article plus explicit contact routes (louis@dupple.com and techpresso@dupple.com).
Expanded placeholder-email filtering to reject domain.com and email@domain.com-style junk exposed by the Dupple rerun.
Added regression coverage for explicit Dupple publisher emails and the newly caught placeholder-email pattern.

new_target.name: Dupple
new_target.recommended_next_step: email/contact send path is now identified

replacement_condition: If Dupple enters the active outreach window or another higher-reach publisher with direct editorial contact appears, rotate the top recommendation instead of re-logging the same discovery refresh.
